user.title: Sonos Hue Sync
user.description: Configure the Sonos speaker and Hue lights/groups.

data_description.sonos_entity: Choose the Sonos media player to follow. For grouped speakers, choose the room that shows the active playback metadata.
data_description.light_entities: Choose one or more Home Assistant light entities. You may select individual bulbs, Hue rooms, zones, or groups.
data_description.color_count: Number of colors to extract from album art. If there are more lights than colors, colors repeat.
data_description.transition: Fade time in seconds when changing colors.
data_description.filter_dull: Remove low-saturation or very dark colors from the extracted palette.
data_description.cache: Reuse colors for album art that has already been processed.
data_description.expand_groups: When a selected light is a room, zone, or group, try to apply colors to its individual member lights.

init.title: Sonos Hue Sync options
init.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.
